phrases.intent_en: How to validate app ticket at machine
phrases.text_local: Jak ověřit jízdenku z aplikace v automatu?
phrases.cultural_note: ČD app tickets are validated by scanning the on-screen QR code at designated yellow validators.

likely_response.local: Načtěte QR kód u žlutého automatu.
likely_response.translation_en: Scan the QR code at the yellow machine.

responses.english: Scan the QR code at the yellow machine.
responses.local: Načtěte QR kód u žlutého automatu.

phrases.cultural_note: Smaller stations like Český Krumlov often handle luggage payment at a specific ticket window.

phrases.intent_en: Where is platform two for České Budějovice
phrases.text_local: Kde je druhé nástupiště na České Budějovice?
phrases.cultural_note: Platform dispatchers often give quick underpass directions rather than pointing vaguely.

likely_response.translation_en: Through the underpass, then right up the stairs.

responses.english: Through the underpass, then right up the stairs.

phrases.intent_en: When does next train to Linz depart
phrases.text_local: Kdy jede další vlak do Lince?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff often combine the time with the platform number in one short answer.
